Grubhub for Drivers

Scheduling

ROLE
Design Lead
BETA
2026
OVERVIEW
Rebuilt the scheduling experience to help drivers find the best times to work, understand guaranteed earnings, and plan shifts with confidence. Together with Shift Tracker, both projects are expected to lift median hourly earnings from $4–7 to $11–15, staff the 17% of meal times chronically understaffed, and generate $3.8M in annual cost savings.
